title: Integrated M.S./Ph.D. student
bio_short: I'm a Integrated M.S./Ph.D. student at UNIST AIGS, advised by Prof. Jaejun Yoo at LAIT — I build multimodal generators and the benchmarks that keep them honest.
bio_long: I'm a Integrated M.S./Ph.D. student at UNIST AIGS, advised by Prof. Jaejun Yoo at LAIT. I work on multimodal generation — increasingly where audio and video have to move together — and on the benchmarks that decide whether the result actually holds up. I build the models, then probe them with evaluations that expose where modalities drift out of sync or quietly fake the alignment.
research_vision: I work on multimodal generation — especially audio and video that have to stay synchronized — and on the benchmarks that decide whether the result actually holds up. I build generators across modalities, then stress-test them with evaluations that expose where alignment slips and where fidelity quietly fakes itself.
